riskiest-assumption.title: Riskiest Assumption
riskiest-assumption.prompt: If this is wrong, where does the whole idea fail?
examples: Users will pay monthly for automated reports
Procurement owners can finish security review in 7 days
Sales teams will enter leads into the new workflow

falsifiable-hypothesis.title: Falsifiable Hypothesis
falsifiable-hypothesis.prompt: What action will drive what result within what timeframe?
examples: We believe a demo page will generate 30 bookings in 2 weeks
We believe fewer form fields will increase completion by 25%
We believe at least 3 of 5 target customers will try it

experiment-setup.title: Experiment Setup
experiment-setup.prompt: What method, sample, material, and timeframe will test it?
examples: Run a landing-page test with 50 target customers
Use a Figma prototype for 8 usability interviews
Let 3 sales pods trial the new lead-routing rule for 2 weeks

metrics-criteria.title: Metrics & Criteria
metrics-criteria.prompt: What data proves the hypothesis true or false?
examples: Average handling time down 30% counts as success
Fewer than 2 trial commitments invalidates the assumption

results-conclusion.title: Results & Conclusion
results-conclusion.prompt: What happened, and is it validated, invalidated, or unclear?
examples: Only 1 customer agreed to try it — invalidated

next-steps.title: Next Steps
next-steps.prompt: Persevere, pivot, or redo the experiment — and who owns it?
examples: Persevere: expand sample to 200 target customers
Pivot: test a lower-priced entry offer
Redo: test again with a clickable prototype
